steps.title: Translate distance for each activity
steps.content: Distance = speed $\times$ time. Walking: 3 mph for $w$ hours gives $3w$ miles. Jogging: 8 mph for $r$ hours gives $8r$ miles.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• A: $3w + 8r = 19$ - matches the derived equation. Correct
  • B: $\frac{1}{3}w + \frac{1}{8}r = 19$ - uses reciprocals of speed (time per mile), not speed. Incorrect
  • C: $\frac{1}{3}w + \frac{1}{8}r = 209$ - wrong coefficients and wrong total. Incorrect
  • D: $3w + 8r = 209$ - correct coefficients but the total is 19 miles, not 209. Incorrect
That matches the correct answer - A is correct.
